content: Industry-standard answer to 'track a family member without their own smartphone' is a dedicated hardware wearable/tag (Jiobit, GizmoWatch) using Bluetooth+Wi-Fi+Cellular+GPS with SOS button. Since SafePath AI is explicitly software-only (no hardware), this gap must be solved differently: e.g. a lightweight 'Companion/Kiosk Mode' account profile that runs on a hand-me-down phone/tablet, showing only SOS + location + minimal UI for that member, rather than full family-app access.
